title: D, G Arpeggio
content:
T: D Arpeggios
M: 4/4
L: 1/4
K: D
||DFAF|DFAF|D4||
K: G
||GBdB|GBdB|G4||

title: Long Tones Ascending Basic
content: While watching your tuner, start on A4 (A above your lowest D) and hold for 4 beats before slurring up to the next available note on your flute (Bb if you have keys otherwise B). Take a breath and start on the second note and continuing upward.

title: Long Tones Descending Scale
content:
X:1
T:D Long Tones Descend
M:4/4
L:1/4
K:D
|(b2a2)|(a2g2)|(g2f2)|
